case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. TANYA M JAMAICA et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JAMAICA, TANYA M DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-08-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-06-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-24-2007
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED MAR-25-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JAMAICA, TANYA M

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-08-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-28-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-25-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-28-2007 CONTINUED TO DEC-28-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-28-2007 CONTINUED TO FEB-22-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
